description:
This quiz tests foundational SQL query skills, including database querying, filtering, and joining tables, with a beginner to intermediate difficulty level. The tone is playful and encouraging, using emojis and casual language to engage learners.
Topics: SQL syntax, Data filtering (WHERE clauses), Table joins (INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN), Aggregate functions, Basic query optimization
Audience: Developers who primarily use ORMs but want to strengthen their raw SQL capabilities, as well as learners studying SQL fundamentals for the first time.
